utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. (5) setup_services – includes utility and setup details, costs, and currency. (6) total_budget – includes complete cost breakdown with all relevant sub-costs and totals. All required items are present and fully specified according to the format.
